title: stelis cleistogama
intro: Stelis cleistogama, also known as the cleistogamous orchid, is a type of plant that produces flowers that self-pollinate without opening. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis cleistogama include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
